Package org.siprop.v2.stack.sip.transaction

Interface Summary
TransactionController This class has set of transactions.
TransactionEntry This interface is base of Transaction.
TransactionInfo This interface holds the packet about a Transaction.
 

Class Summary
SIPTimer This class has values of SIP Timers Accroding to RFC3261 Appendix A Timer Value Meaning ---------------------------------------------------------------------- T1 500ms default RTT Estimate T2 4s The maximum retransmit interval for non-INVITE requests and INVITE responses T4 5s Maximum duration a message will remain in the network Timer A initially T1 INVITE request retransmit interval, for UDP only Timer B 64*T1 INVITE transaction timeout timer Timer C > 3min proxy INVITE transaction timeout Timer D > 32s for UDP Wait time for response retransmits 0s for TCP/SCTP Timer E initially T1 non-INVITE request retransmit interval, UDP only Timer F 64*T1 non-INVITE transaction timeout timer Timer G initially T1 INVITE response retransmit interval Timer H 64*T1 Wait time for ACK receipt Timer I T4 for UDP Wait time for ACK retransmits 0s for TCP/SCTP Timer J 64*T1 for UDP Wait time for non-INVITE request retransmits 0s for TCP/SCTP Timer K T4 for UDP Wait time for response retransmits 0s for TCP/SCTP
 

Enum Summary
TransactionState This enum indicates status of SIP transaction.
TransactionType This enum indicates type of SIP transaction.
